title: Chandigarh admin challenges Punjab and Haryana HC decision to quash 2020 protest case against CM Bhagwant Mann
description: The Chandigarh Administration has moved the Supreme Court challenging a Punjab and Haryana High Court decision to quash a case of rioting and unlawful assembly against Punjab Chief Minister (CM) Bhagwant Mann and other leaders of Aam Aadmi Party (AAP).A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant, Justice Joymalya Bagchi and Justice Vipin Pancholi agreed to list the plea.Solicitor General Tushar Mehta and Additional Solicitor General SV Raju appeared for the UT Chandigarh.Mehta submitted th
